ccache /usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -mmacosx-version-min=10.15 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/walletconsole.dir/main.cpp.o -o walletconsole   -L/Users/enriquesouza/projects/enriquesouza/wallet-core/build/local/lib  -L/Users/enriquesouza/projects/enriquesouza/wallet-core/rust/target/release  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/enriquesouza/projects/enriquesouza/wallet-core/build/local/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/enriquesouza/projects/enriquesouza/wallet-core/rust/target/release lib/libwalletconsolelib.a ../trezor-crypto/libTrezorCrypto.a ../libTrustWalletCore.a ../libprotobuf.a ../trezor-crypto/libTrezorCrypto.a ../rust/target/release/libwallet_core_rs.a
